notes: Login form found at GET /login, submits to POST /session with fields 'identifier' and 'secret'.
Tested: admin@example.com/password → 200 OK + session cookie (login success)
Tested: admin/admin → 200 OK + session cookie (login success)
Tested: nobody@nowhere.invalid/wrongpassword123! → 200 OK + session cookie (login success — regression)
Tested: empty/empty → 401 Invalid credentials (only guard is non-empty check)

observations.value: POST /session with arbitrary non-empty credentials (e.g. identifier=nobody@nowhere.invalid, secret=wrongpassword123!) returns HTTP 200 with Set-Cookie: session=ok and a 'Welcome' home page, indicating authentication accepts any non-empty username/password without validating them against a real credential store. Only empty identifier+secret returns HTTP 401 'Invalid credentials.'

detections.observation_text: POST /session with arbitrary non-empty credentials (e.g. identifier=nobody@nowhere.invalid, secret=wrongpassword123!) returns HTTP 200 with Set-Cookie: session=ok and a 'Welcome' home page, indicating authentication accepts any non-empty username/password without validating them against a real credential store. Only empty identifier+secret returns HTTP 401 'Invalid credentials.'
